mapper.select: SELECT ca.id AS ca_id, ca.user_id AS ca_user_id, ca.application_status AS ca_application_status, ca.submitted_at AS ca_submitted_at, ca.exam_duration AS ca_exam_duration, ca.answers AS ca_answers, ca.admin_remarks AS ca_admin_remarks, ca.reviewed_at AS ca_reviewed_at, u.username AS u_username FROM certification_application ca JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ca.submitted_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certification_application (user_id, answers, exam_duration, application_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{answers}, #{examDuration}, #{applicationStatus})
mapper.update:
UPDATE certification_application
application_status = #{applicationStatus},
admin_remarks = #{adminRemarks},
reviewed_at = NOW(),
WHERE id = #{id}
